name: Banana Pancakes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, combine the flours, baking powder, and salt.
2. In a separate bowl, mix together the milk and oil until well combined.
3. Stir the liquid mixture into the dry ingredients just enough to moisten all of the ingredients.
4. Gently fold in the chopped banana.
5. Spoon the batter onto a hot, well-greased griddle.
6. Turn each pancake once during cooking.
7. Makes 10 to 12 pancakes.
